title: Slate Auto’s radically simple electric truck starts at $24,950
summary: Slate Auto, a Jeff Bezos-backed startup, unveiled pricing for its debut electric vehicle with the truck starting at $24,950 and an SUV variant at $29,950, both featuring a 205-mile base range. The announcement represents a significant step toward affordable electric vehicles in the mass market.
content: The Jeff Bezos-backed startup finally revealed more pricing details for its debut EV, including a $29,950 starting price for the SUV variant, and boosted the base range to 205 miles.

zh.title: Slate Auto的激进简约电动皮卡起价$24,950
zh.summary: Slate Auto是一家获得Jeff Bezos支持的初创公司，公布了其首款电动车的价格，皮卡起价$24,950，SUV版本起价$29,950，两款车型的基础续航里程均为205英里。这一公告代表了向大众市场推进可负担电动车的重要一步。

title: Star Fox is the Switch 2’s most impressive visual showcase yet
summary: Star Fox, a Nintendo 64 remake for Switch 2, distinguishes itself among launch titles through its on-rails shooter gameplay and spectacular set-pieces that showcase the console's graphical capabilities. Its linear design allows for detailed visual craftsmanship compared to more expansive Switch 2 launch titles.
content:
The biggest Switch 2 exclusives so far have largely been about scale. Mario Kart World introduced a wide open continent to race across, Donkey Kong Bananza let you smash basically everything around you, and Pokopia brought an expansive Minecraft-style creative experience to the Pokémon universe. Star Fox is different. A remake of a Nintendo 64 game, Star Fox is an on-rails shooter, with tightly choreographed action and spectacular set-pieces. This more linear structure has let the game's designers craft what is perhaps the best-looking game yet for the Switch 2. Considering that Star Fox is at its best when it makes you feel like you're righ …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 星际火狐是Switch 2迄今最令人印象深刻的视觉展示
zh.summary: 作为任天堂64的Switch 2翻制版，星际火狐通过其轨道射击玩法和壮观的场景在发布游戏中脱颖而出，展示了主机的图形能力。相比其他更开放的Switch 2发布游戏，其线性设计允许呈现更精细的视觉设计。

title: I drove the Slate Truck — there’s more to it than EV minimalism
summary: Slate Auto's new electric pickup starts at $24,950, making it the least expensive pickup truck and EV available by prioritizing price over convenience features. The company stripped away standard amenities to meet the aggressive price point in a market where average vehicles cost nearly double.
content:
With its new pickup, Slate Auto is making a simple bet: price matters more than almost anything else. The company announced today that the American-made electric truck will start at $24,950, placing it squarely in the mid-$20,000 price range it had originally promised and making it the least expensive pickup truck and EV available today. At a time when the average new vehicle costs nearly twice that amount, Slate is pitching something that has become increasingly rare in the modern auto market: a genuinely basic new vehicle that doesn't look that way.
To hit that price point, Slate stripped away features many drivers now take for granted. T …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我试驾了Slate皮卡——不仅仅是电动车极简主义
zh.summary: Slate Auto的新型电动皮卡起价$24,950，通过优先考虑价格而非便利功能，成为目前最便宜的皮卡和电动车。该公司去除了标准配置以达到这一激进价位，而在这个市场上，平均车辆成本几乎是其两倍。

title: The Slate Auto pickup truck starts at $24,950
summary: Slate Auto confirmed its electric truck will start at $24,950, delivering on its revised mid-$20,000 price target after abandoning its initial under-$20,000 promise. Preorders open today with a $300 deposit, and the company aims to begin production in autumn 2026 with deliveries expected in late 2026.
content:
Slate Auto made good on thet mid-$20,000 price range promise. | Image: The Verge	

We now know the price of Slate Auto's affordable American-made electric truck, almost a year after the company warned it wouldn't hit its initial "under $20,000" target price. The no-frills pickup starts at $24,950 - matching the revised mid-$20,000 price range it promised last year, after the Trump administration announced it was putting an end to the $7,500 federal EV tax credit.
Preorders for the Slate truck are going live today, with production scheduled to begin in autumn 2026. Customers can pay a $300 non-refundable deposit within the next 30 days to lock in a delivery date, which is expected to start in "late 2026." On its website, S …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Slate Auto皮卡起价24,950美元
zh.summary: Slate Auto确认其电动皮卡起价24,950美元，实现了调整后的中等20,000美元价格目标，放弃了最初的20,000美元以下承诺。预订今日开放，需支付300美元定金，公司目标在2026年秋季开始生产，预期2026年底交付。

title: The Dyson PencilWash is down to its lowest price ever for Prime Day
summary: Dyson's PencilWash cordless floor cleaner is available for $199.99 during Prime Day, marking its lowest price at $150 off and providing a more affordable entry point for Dyson's cleaning lineup. The compact electric mop offers 30 minutes of battery life and self-propelling brush technology for hardwood floors.
content:
Dyson’s PencilWash cordless hard floor cleaner is on sale for $199.99 ($150 off) at Amazon. This is the lowest price yet for the powered wet mop that’s a cousin to the silly-sounding-but-awesome Dyson PencilVac Fluffycones vacuum.
The PencilWash basically takes the sleek styling and design of the PencilVac and simplifies it into a single-purpose electric mop. It’s designed for all manner of hard home flooring, and its slim head and pivoting neck allow it to get low to reach underneath furniture. Dyson claims you can get 30 minutes of cleaning time before you have to pop it onto the included charging dock, and the 300ml water tank is estimated to cover up to 1,000 square feet before needing a refill.
Dyson PencilWash

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $199.99 at Amazon

While the pencil name is cute, and the mop certainly looks svelte, keep in mind that it weighs around five pounds (heavier than the PencilVac) before adding any water or cleaning solution to its tank. But its self-propelling brush should help push that heft around your space without most of the weight being felt in your hand — until you’re mopping stairs.
$200 isn’t cheap for a single-purpose cleaning tool (let alone its full price of $350), but the PencilWash costs much less than the $600 PencilVac Fluffycones. Our own smart home reviewer, Jennifer Pattison Tuohy, called the PencilVac “the perfect companion to your robot vacuum.” The PencilWash is like the companion for that companion.

zh.title: Dyson PencilWash在Prime Day期间跌至历史最低价
zh.summary: Dyson的PencilWash无线地板清洁器在Prime Day期间以199.99美元的价格提供，便宜150美元，创历史新低，为Dyson清洁产品系列提供了更实惠的入门选择。这款小巧的电动拖把提供30分钟电池续航和自驱动刷毛技术，适用于硬木地板。

title: Our favorite Prime Day deals you can shop on day two
summary: Amazon Prime Day continues with numerous tech deals on laptops, accessories, and smart home products, with prices matched at Best Buy, Walmart, and Target for non-Prime members. The Verge's curated selections highlight products its team has tested and verified over years of real-world use.
content:
Welcome to day two of Amazon’s four-day Prime Day event, which, if we’re being honest, looks a lot like day one. That’s actually good news, though, because many of the best deals are still around, and some new ones have joined them. If you’ve got a Prime subscription, whether through a free trial or a discounted student membership, you’ll find our favorite deals below.
Not every Prime Day deal deserves your attention, so we’ve filled this guide with products we know and genuinely like. Our team has spent years living with, testing, and comparing everything from robot vacuums and TVs to headphones and smart home gadgets, and the deals below are the ones we can confidently vouch for. We’ve also sprinkled in matching prices from retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Target whenever we find them, so you don’t necessarily need a Prime membership to save.
If you’re shopping for something specific, we’ve got dedicated roundups covering Apple gear, budget-friendly picks, smart home devices, TVs, and much more. We’ll also be updating this guide throughout the day as new deals pop up and old ones disappear, so check back occasionally.
Laptop deals
The days of multi-hundred-dollar discounts on MacBooks are behind us for now, but the base 14-inch MacBook Pro with an M5 chip for $1,549 ($150 off) at Amazon and Best Buy is still a solid deal. It’s powerful enough for the average content creator, comes with 16GB of RAM and 1TB of storage, and has lots of ports. Read our review.
Apple MacBook Air (M5)
Apple’s 2026 MacBook Air has an M5 chip and starts with 512GB of storage that’s significantly faster than previous generations. It’s still as excellent as ever despite a higher base price. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $1099 $949.99 at Amazon (13-inch)
 $1099 $949 at Best Buy (13-inch)
 $1299 $1149.99 at Amazon (15-inch)

Moft has a variety of deals on its origami-style cases and stands. You can get its folding 2-in-1 Laptop Carry Sleeve, a sleek laptop case that doubles as a port

zh.title: 我们最喜欢的Prime Day第二天优惠
zh.summary: Amazon Prime Day继续提供笔记本电脑、配件和智能家居产品等众多科技优惠，Best Buy、沃尔玛和Target为非Prime会员提供相同价格。The Verge精选的商品展示了其团队多年来测试和验证的产品。

title: GTA VI finally gets a price tag
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI will launch at $79.99 for the standard edition and $99.99 for the Ultimate Edition, with preorders beginning immediately for PS5 and Xbox Series X/S. The game releases November 19th, 2026, and both digital and physical editions allow preloading ahead of launch.
content:
We finally have a price for Grand Theft Auto VI: $79.99. That gets you the standard edition of the game, while the Ultimate Edition will set you back $99.99.
Preorders start at midnight tonight, local time, when you'll be able to reserve a copy on PS5 or Xbox Series X/S. You'll be able to order either digital or physical editions of the game, though Rockstar has confirmed that even the physical editions contain "a download code inside the box." The upside is that they'll ship from November 12th, allowing buyers of either edition to preload the game ahead of its full release on November 19th.
Anyone who preorders or purchases the game befor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《GTA VI》终于公布了价格
zh.summary: 《侠盗猎车手6》将以标准版79.99美元和终极版99.99美元的价格推出，PS5和Xbox Series X/S的预购即刻开始。游戏将于2026年11月19日发布，数字版和实体版都支持提前预加载。

title: Bob Iger’s Disney wanted Apple, Twitter, and 007
summary: Former Disney CEO Bob Iger revealed in an exit interview that the company pursued acquisitions of Twitter from Jack Dorsey, an investment stake with Apple, and the James Bond franchise—all ultimately unsuccessful. These missed opportunities occurred during his two-decade tenure that otherwise transformed Disney through major acquisitions.
content:
You can’t always get what you want. | Photo by Tommaso Boddi/Variety via Getty Images	

Bob Iger's tenure as CEO of Disney came to an end a few months ago, after two decades of leading the entertainment giant through some of its most pivotal transformations and acquisitions. Iger, in an exit interview with The Financial Times, has now confirmed some significant efforts that didn't pan out, such as walking away from buying Twitter, being snubbed by Apple, and losing out on the James Bond franchise.
According to Iger, Disney came close to buying Twitter from cofounder Jack Dorsey "at a very attractive price," sometime prior to Elon Musk buying the social media platform in 2022 and changing its name to X. Iger had plans to turn T …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 鲍勃·艾格麾下的迪士尼曾想收购苹果、推特和007
zh.summary: 前迪士尼首席执行官鲍勃·艾格在离职采访中透露，公司曾追求收购杰克·多西的推特、对苹果的投资股份以及詹姆斯·邦德特许经营权，但最终都未成功。这些失败的收购机会发生在他二十年的任期内，期间他通过重大并购大幅改变了迪士尼。

title: How to invest when everything is moving too fast
summary: Two prominent AI investors at a TechCrunch event discussed strategies for navigating rapid market shifts and investment opportunities in the fast-moving AI sector. The conversation highlighted practical approaches for making investment decisions amid volatile and quickly-changing market conditions.
content: TechCrunch's StrictlyVC evening in Los Angeles late last week brought together two of the more straight-talking investors working in AI right now. They were as entertaining as they were illuminating.

zh.title: 在一切变化如此之快的时代如何投资
zh.summary: 在一次TechCrunch活动中，两位杰出的AI投资者讨论了在快速市场变化和AI领域投资机会中导航的策略。对话强调了在不稳定且快速变化的市场条件下做出投资决策的实际方法。

title: Walmart-backed Flipkart expands quick-commerce push as Amazon ramps up in India
summary: Flipkart has reached 1,000 micro-fulfillment centers as Amazon accelerates its quick-commerce operations in India. The expansion reflects intensifying competition between the two e-commerce giants in the country's fast-growing logistics market.
content: Walmart-backed Flipkart has crossed 1,000 micro-fulfillment centers as Amazon accelerates its own quick-commerce push in India.

zh.title: 沃尔玛支持的Flipkart在亚马逊加快印度快速商务扩张之际推进自身业务
zh.summary: 随着亚马逊加快在印度的快速商务运营，Flipkart已建成1000个微型物流中心。这一扩张反映了两大电商巨头在印度快速增长的物流市场中竞争的加剧。
